title: MRE Mod
description: It adds a Meal, Ready-to-Eat (MRE) to Minecraft, providing 20 saturation units and fully replenishing hunger. Perfect for survival situations.
body:
# 📑 Description

MRE Mod introduces a new food item to Minecraft - the Meal, Ready-to-Eat (MRE). This compact and efficient food source is designed for survival situations, providing a whopping 20 saturation units and completely filling the hunger bar with just one serving. Ideal for adventurers and survivalists, the MRE ensures you stay nourished and ready to face any challenge in your Minecraft world.

**Remember to install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

# ⚙️ Recipes

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6c2a74edaa38b90c19db6916b6048e2a123edc7.png)
